text:
Certainly! Here's a comprehensive REST API design for a collaborative document editing platform that supports real-time collaboration, versioning, and access control. The design focuses on clarity, scalability, and efficiency, aligning with best practices for performance and resource management.

---

## 1. **Entities & Resources**

| Resource             | Description                                        |
|----------------------|----------------------------------------------------|
| `/documents`       | Collection of documents                            |
| `/documents/{id}`  | Specific document details                          |
| `/documents/{id}/content` | Document content (real-time edits)             |
| `/documents/{id}/versions` | Version history of a document                 |
| `/documents/{id}/access`   | Access control management                    |
| `/documents/{id}/collaborators` | Collaborators info                     |

---

## 2. **API Endpoints**

### **A. Document Management**

| Method | Endpoint                        | Description                                   | Response                                   |
|---------|---------------------------------|----------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| `POST` | `/documents`                    | Create a new document                        | 201 Created, document metadata            |
| `GET`  | `/documents/{id}`               | Retrieve document metadata                   | 200 OK, document details                  |
| `PUT`  | `/documents/{id}`               | Update document metadata                     | 200 OK, updated metadata                  |
| `DELETE` | `/documents/{id}`             | Delete a document                            | 204 No Content                            |

---

### **B. Document Content & Real-Time Collaboration**

| Method | Endpoint                         | Description                                             | Response                                  |
|---------|----------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| `GET`  | `/documents/{id}/content`        | Fetch current document content                         | 200 OK, content (e.g., JSON, plain text) |
| `PUT`  | `/documents/{id}/content`        | Save full document content (versioning trigger)       | 200 OK                                   |
| `PATCH` | `/documents/{id}/content`        | Apply incremental edits (diffs) or real-time patches  | 200 OK                                   |

*Note:* For real-time edits, clients can establish a WebSocket or server-sent events (SSE) connection for low-latency updates beyond REST.

---

### **C. Versioning**

| Method | Endpoint                                  | Description                                   | Response                         |
|---------|-------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------|----------------------------------|
| `GET`  | `/documents/{id}/versions`                | List all versions                          | 200 OK, list of version summaries |
| `GET`  | `/documents/{id}/versions/{version_id}`   | Retrieve a specific version                  | 200 OK, version details          |
| `POST` | `/documents/{id}/versions`                | Create a new version (manual save)          | 201 Created                     |

---

### **D. Access Control**
